project.title: Geodermatophilus obscurus DSM43160 proteomics
project.projectDescription: This project contributes to the proteomic comparison of different bacteria. A whole proteome catalogue was obtained for Geodermatophilus obscurus  DSM43160 grown in standard conditions.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Protein samples were loaded on a SDS-PAGE, sliced into polyacrylamide bands, digested by trypsin, and the resulting peptides were analyzed by LTQ-Orbitrap XL tandem mass spectrometry.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MS/MS spectra were analyzed by MASCOT, the results were then parsed with IRMA.

value.name: Geodermatophilus obscurus (strain ATCC 25078 / DSM 43160 / JCM 3152 / G-20)

organisms.name: Geodermatophilus obscurus (strain atcc 25078 / dsm 43160 / jcm 3152 / g-20)

references.referenceLine: Sghaier H, Hezbri K, Ghodhbane-Gtari F, Pujic P, Sen A, Daffonchio D, Boudabous A, Tisa LS, Klenk HP, Armengaud J, Normand P, Gtari M. Stone-dwelling actinobacteria Blastococcus saxobsidens, Modestobacter marinus and Geodermatophilus obscurus proteogenomes. ISME J. 2015 Jun 30
